Welcome back everyone. So now it is the 10 minute call script. Alright so what you know like we just did all the messaging now we get them on the phone. Alright so the objective here is to get them to like you, chat with them, compliment them, flattery works. There's a research study that showed that when everyone loves flattery and there is no limit to how many compliments you can give someone even when they know that you were doing it for fake. Alright this was a research study. They even told people that they were going to be complimented by strangers who didn't know anything about them and they still liked the strangers more even when they knew that the strangers didn't know them and were just saying compliments. Alright and from the multiple studies that they did in this review the amount of compliments that someone can take before they before it turns negative is infinity. There isn't one. People love being complimented. Alright so your objective here is to compliment them and get them to like you. Alright so again when speaking to a human being acknowledge what they said, you can repeat it back to them and compliment them on the thing that they just did or a character trait that they have demonstrated by saying that and then follow up with the next question in the script. That is how this works. You need to control the conversation and you need to stay on script. Alright if you feel like your 10-minute calls take 40 minutes then you're taking way too long and not controlling the script. Alright and note if someone is in your local market you can just set up an in-person appointment and close them there on the end of the script instead of setting a call time. It's up to you. Alright boom. So you will notice here that this is very similar to the script that we just went over and it's because selling is the exact same process over and over and over again no matter what. Alright so you're going to clarify their goal. These are rapid-fire questions so I do rapid-fire questions because a lot of people need multiple questions to kind of understand what they're going to talk about. So what's your goal? What are you trying to do? Right this is after you've already had some time to chat with in here. Remember you're chatting with them making them seem normal, making you seem normal. You're cool. So what's your goal? What are you trying to do right now? Alright okay what do you write? Cool. So where do you store your fat? Upper body, lower body or both? Oh and your upper body. Is it front, back or sides are all three? Can you pinch or can you grab it? How many inches? Right they're gonna be rustling around but it's gonna make their fat visceral. Their pain will be visceral to them and you want to write that down because you're gonna use it on the sales call at the end. Your 60 minute call. Alright so label them with a problem. Got it. So you're trying to lose 20 pounds mostly from your midsection where you have five inches of fat. Is that about right? Okay cool. So how long have you been struggling with this? Notice I'm going down the script. How long have you been struggling with this? Totally get it. You know what? Like that makes you like a lot of people my mom was like that too. She struggled with it forever. Totally understand. Alright what have you tried so far? How'd that work for you? For how long? Right? Ask these questions and then what else? Loop around until you've exhausted everything they've done. Cool. So in 12 months what would have to happen for you to be excited about results or change? Right? They'll paint you the vivid picture of what they want to have happen. You're like awesome that's totally worth fighting for when you deserve it. Right? The people the most successful have a powerful why. What's yours? Right? And they're gonna give you the why and you're gonna relate that later. Now that was that is the script. Okay? Now all we're doing is closing the 60 minute call. I think you're the type of person that's right goals on the right why. So I think we could totally work together. So what I always do is next is send a more in-depth questionnaire so you don't feel like you're being interrogated. How hot does that work? Cool. After doing this a lot of times the best results come from people who take action quickly while it's fresh on your mind. Can you fill it out now? They'll say yes. You're like great. What's the best email to send it to? Alright? I'll stay on the line to make sure you got it. Right? And that way they stay on their side until they get it and be like awesome. Now if they say no, if they like you can fill it out right now. Then you say well when do you think you can fill it out? I'll take you more in 10 minutes. I'm gonna like and I'll keep reminding you. Ha ha ha. Right? And they'll be like ha ha. And then you'll say great. Okay again what's the best email to send it to? Then send them the email or the application like if you already have like a Woofoo embedded on a landing page a Woofoo form or a Google form. You can send it. You can send them a Google form which is free by the way. Or you can send them an actual email that's written out. Both of them are effective. The email seems a little bit more personalized. It's up to you. Okay? I'll stay on the line. Let me know when you see it on your side. Great. So should I expect the next 30 or so? Can you do that? Try and get the close on yes. Right? Awesome. Okay. So are you free same time tomorrow? Now we're scheduling the next call time. Awesome. Look forward to diving deep on this and giving you a plan that you can implement. Sound good? Great. Alright? So then with the follow-up text it's like hey if you haven't like you'd say I send it over you know just let me know when you're done filling it out. Pump to see your responses and dig in. So obviously use your brain if you've already talked to them that they already have it then just say like hey let me know when you're done filling it out. Alright? Very straightforward and the point here is that saying hey I need you to fill this out before we get on the next call and you're gonna try and get them to make sure that they already micro committed a ton on this that they're gonna fill it out. Alright? And this is what is important to set you up for the close call that you have. Now between the time that they filled out and the time that you have the call I'll go over the questions and the applications and if you need to ask for clarification on their responses then you'll do that prior to the call so that you don't get on the call with somebody who says I'm not interested in fitness I don't want to invest blah blah blah.
